boonCookieDescription: Earn $1 at end of round. Increases by $2 when a Boss is defeated
boonAllinDescription: Adds X4 Mult on final move of round
boonOffgridDescription: Dodaje <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> na koniec każdego ruchu (jeden punkt za pole)
boonClickbaitDescription: Dodaje <multi>+2 Multi</multi> za każde przerzucenie sklepu w tej próbie (obecnie <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
